examples: Know that feeling? Once I became a printmaker, my natural instinct was to go from paper to fabric and back again.
At the Frick, there's a remarkably complete survey of Manet as a printmaker, reinventing broadly handled paintings as etchings and lithographs.
Reckoning that he had a period copy, perhaps drawn by a printmaker preparing an etching, Hebborn resolved to replace it with the lost original.
William Bailey, a top-notch painter, printmaker and respected professor of art at Yale University, has been on the art scene since the late 1960s.
